decision_labels.toxic_candidate: Pre-swap oracle/pool gap is outside the noise floor and the swap direction closes the gap.
decision_labels.benign_candidate: Swap direction widens the oracle/pool gap or the gap remains inside the configured noise floor.
decision_labels.uncertain: Oracle is stale, ordering is ambiguous, or the gap is inside the tighter noise band.

outcome_labels.toxic_confirmed: Future reference prices keep markout positive and the observed pool/oracle gap closes beyond the configured threshold.
outcome_labels.benign_confirmed: Future reference prices do not show adverse selection and the observed gap does not close in the toxic direction.
outcome_labels.uncertain: Horizons disagree, future reference points are missing, or the price mean-reverts inside the reversion window.
